nasb.text: And then He will send forth the angels, and will gather together His elect from the four winds, from the farthest end of the earth to the farthest end of heaven.

esv.text: And then he will send out the angels and gather his elect from the four winds, from the ends of the earth to the ends of heaven.

cnv.text: 他要差派天使，把他的選民從四方，從地極直到天邊，都招聚來。

ccb.text: 祂必差遣天使从四面八方、天涯海角招聚祂拣选的人。

csbs.text: 他要差派天使们，并且从四方，从地极到天边，召集他所拣选的人。
